title: GMS Week 27 - FLEET EXITS, DOLLAR ENTERS
section_path: GMS Week 27 - FLEET EXITS, DOLLAR ENTERS
section_path_text: GMS Week 27 - FLEET EXITS, DOLLAR ENTERS
summary:
Main
The war is over, and the fleet is finally moving. Crude flows through Hormuz exceeded 10 million barrels per daythis week under US military coordination, while Lloyd's List counts roughly 550 merchant vessels preparing to exit the Gulf, including some 200 bulk carriers. The central channel remains constrained by an estimated 80 mines, keeping traffic to the northern and southern routes for now, but the direction of travel is no longer theoretical.
